intro_cards.title: Shall We / Shall I: ましょうか
intro_cards.body:
ましょうか is a polite offer or suggestion — 'Shall I ~?' or 'Shall we ~?'

Offering to do something for someone:
• 荷物を持ちましょうか？(Shall I carry your luggage?)
• 窓を閉めましょうか？(Shall I close the window?)

Suggesting a joint action:
• そろそろ出発しましょうか。(Shall we head out soon?)
• 何を食べましょうか。(What shall we eat?)

Difference:
• ましょう = let's! (assertive proposal)
• ましょうか = shall we? (softer, seeking agreement)
• ませんか = would you like to? (invitation)
